{
  "news": [
    {
      "title": "BTC ETF流出2.68亿美元",
      "summary": "比特币现货ETF昨日净流出2.68亿美元，为近一个月最大单日流出，显示机构资金短期撤离。若流出持续，可能加剧BTC抛压，对BTC直接看空。同时市场担忧新美联储主席政策不明，影响整体风险偏好。",
      "reason": "ETF资金流直接关联BTC价格，属于优先级一重大信号。",
      "category": "ETF机构",
      "impact_coins": ["BTC"],
      "signal": "bearish",
      "impact_level": 4,
      "sources": [{"name": "CoinTelegraph", "url": "https://cointelegraph.com/markets/bitcoin-stalls-as-btc-etf-outflows-hit-268m-will-new-fed-chair-restore-the-rally"}],
      "urgency": "immediate"
    },
    {
      "title": "巨鲸买入6.7万SOL和620万JUP",
      "summary": "一个沉寂7个月的钱包突然活跃，买入67,648枚SOL（约540万美元）和620万枚JUP（约330万美元）。大额买入表明巨鲸看好后市，可能带动SOL和JUP价格上涨，短期看多。",
      "reason": "巨鲸异动（大额买入）属优先级一，直接影响SOL和JUP。",
      "category": "链上异动",
      "impact_coins": ["SOL", "JUP"],
      "signal": "bullish",
      "impact_level": 3,
      "sources": [{"name": "金色财经", "url": "https://jinse.com.cn/lives/511904.html"}],
      "urgency": "hours"
    },
    {
      "title": "Tether销毁20亿枚USDT",
      "summary": "Tether在以太坊网络销毁20亿枚USDT，这是近期较大规模销毁。USDT销毁通常意味着资金离场或需求下降，对整体市场流动性偏利空，短期看空BTC和主流币。",
      "reason": "稳定币供应变化属优先级一，大额销毁为bearish信号。",
      "category": "市场结构",
      "impact_coins": ["BTC", "ETH"],
      "signal": "bearish",
      "impact_level": 3,
      "sources": [{"name": "金色财经", "url": "https://jinse.com.cn/lives/511900.html"}],
      "urgency": "immediate"
    },
    {
      "title": "以太坊DeFi市场份额流失10%",
      "summary": "以太坊DeFi市场份额被竞争对手链蚕食，已失去10%的份额。Solana、SUI等公链增长迅速。这削弱ETH基本面，看空ETH，看多SOL等竞争公链。",
      "reason": "链上指标异常（TVL份额变化）属优先级二，中期利空ETH。",
      "category": "链上异动",
      "impact_coins": ["ETH", "SOL", "SUI"],
      "signal": "bearish",
      "impact_level": 3,
      "sources": [{"name": "Reddit r/cryptocurrency", "url": "https://www.reddit.com/r/CryptoCurrency/comments/1t7om3m/ethereum_loses_10_of_its_defi_market_share_as/"}],
      "urgency": "hours"
    },
    {
      "title": "波士顿联储主席：通胀升温，利率维持高位",
      "summary": "波士顿联储主席Collins警告伊朗冲突加剧通胀，暗示利率将在更长时间内保持高位。鹰派言论压制风险资产，BTC、ETH等加密货币承压，短期看空。",
      "reason": "宏观经济中美联储官员讲话直接影响市场情绪，属优先级二。",
      "category": "宏观经济",
      "impact_coins": ["BTC", "ETH"],
      "signal": "bearish",
      "impact_level": 3,
      "sources": [{"name": "Crypto Briefing", "url": "https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMid0FVX3lxTFBSTDFFX0p4V0dJbjJ4QkhIQlctS2k3UkxnWkZweEpuSHBaaWxhRVhlbkNNbVc1TEI5elpQa2dSYVJZdjFFM1lqZU42UzRySVBUYnFUS29SaUh4Z3VDT056U2s2cFhMdTR4VG93RzJ3MFdBTXRscmFZ?oc=5"}],
      "urgency": "immediate"
    }
  ]
}
